title: Senior iOS Engineer

company.name: Aurora Labs
company.about: Aurora Labs builds privacy-first productivity tools used by millions of people every day.

description: We're looking for a Senior iOS Engineer to own major features end-to-end. You'll work in Swift with SwiftUI, drive architecture decisions, mentor engineers, and partner closely with design. Experience with async/await, modular architecture, and a strong testing culture is required.

title: iOS Engineer, Payments

company.name: Northwind Bank
company.about: Northwind is a digital-first bank reimagining everyday money for a new generation.

description: Join our Payments team to build secure, delightful money-movement experiences. You'll integrate with payment networks, harden flows against fraud, and obsess over reliability. Strong knowledge of UIKit and Swift concurrency expected.

title: Mobile Engineer (iOS)

company.name: Trailhead Health
company.about: Trailhead Health helps people manage chronic conditions with personalized, evidence-based care.

description: Contract role building patient-facing features for our iOS app. You'll ship HealthKit integrations, offline-first sync, and accessible UI. Comfort working independently and writing tests is essential.

title: Lead iOS Developer

company.name: Lumen Media
company.about: Lumen Media is a streaming company delivering live sports and entertainment worldwide.

description: Lead a team of iOS engineers building our flagship streaming app. You'll set technical direction, optimise video playback performance, and grow the team. Deep experience with AVFoundation and large-scale apps required.

title: Junior iOS Developer

company.name: Aurora Labs
company.about: Aurora Labs builds privacy-first productivity tools used by millions of people every day.

description: A great first role for an early-career iOS developer. You'll pair with senior engineers, fix bugs, ship small features, and learn our SwiftUI codebase. We care about curiosity and a willingness to learn more than years of experience.

title: Staff Software Engineer, iOS Platform

company.name: Cobalt Robotics
company.about: Cobalt builds autonomous systems that make physical spaces safer and smarter.

description: Own the iOS platform that field operators rely on. You'll define core architecture, build shared frameworks, improve build and CI tooling, and raise the engineering bar across mobile. Strong systems thinking and Swift expertise required.
